mace_bloodlust.name: Bloodlust
mace_bloodlust.description: While below 50% HP, gain a +2 ATK buff. When you use an attack skill while below 50% HP, restore 5% of max HP.

edward_cape_heat_resist.name: Heat Resistant
edward_cape_heat_resist.description: Reduce damage taken by Heat by 50%

gojo_glasses_predatory_focus.name: Predatory Focus
gojo_glasses_predatory_focus.description: Each time your opponent recovers health, gain that much attack as a buff for 1 turn

chen_sword_cd_mastery.name: Cooldown Mastery
chen_sword_cd_mastery.description: When Ch'en reduces the cooldown of one of her skills, she gains a +1 attack buff. 0/10

broken_sword_shattered_edge.name: Shattered Edge
broken_sword_shattered_edge.description: Start the match with +5 ATK. Each turn, lose 1 ATK until you lose 5 ATK.

pillow_sleepy_surprise.name: Sleepy Surprise
pillow_sleepy_surprise.description: When using a utility skill, 10% chance to stun enemy for 1 turn

assassin_dagger_sharpened_instinct.name: Sharpened Instinct
assassin_dagger_sharpened_instinct.description: Gain a +3 ATK buff for 2 turns when gaining the evasion buff

wooden_shield_stance_guard.name: Stance Guard
wooden_shield_stance_guard.description: While in a stance, gain +2 DEF

frieren_staff_spell_archive_plus.name: Spell Archive+
frieren_staff_spell_archive_plus.description: Frieren may stack up to 6 Pages and her Ultimate will cast Minor Utility Spell 6 times instead of 5.

trafalgar_law_cap_shambles_execute.name: Room of Death
trafalgar_law_cap_shambles_execute.description: Shambles now executes at 20% or less health.

comb_steady_recovery.name: Steady Recovery
comb_steady_recovery.description: At the start of your turn, if you received any damage since your last turn, recover 1 health. If you are at 66% health or below, recover 2 instead. If you are at 33% health or below, recover 3 instead.

communication_device_parity_link.name: Parity Link
communication_device_parity_link.description: If your current health is even, gain +4 ATK. Otherwise, gain -5 ATK.

rimuru_sword_true_damage_proc.name: Predator's Edge
rimuru_sword_true_damage_proc.description: When using a skill, deal 1 true damage to the enemy.

construction_shovel_rallying_grit.name: Rallying Grit
construction_shovel_rallying_grit.description: Each time you take damage, gain +1 ATK for 2 turns.

zero_two_suit_twisted_affection.name: Twisted Affection
zero_two_suit_twisted_affection.description: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Heartbreak and recover the opponent's health by 3. If the opponent used an ultimate on the previous turn, gain 3 additional Heartbreak.

naruto_uzumaki_cape_hokages_aegis.name: Hokage's Aegis
naruto_uzumaki_cape_hokages_aegis.description: When casting your ultimate, gain 10 Shield and recover 10 health.

sekki_single_strike_protocol.name: Single-Strike Protocol
sekki_single_strike_protocol.description: Enemy multi-strike attacks instead deal a single combined hit.
